examples.name: OSPF routes in single VRF with attached/local/direct entries and ECMP
examples.input:
IP Route Table for VRF "ndi-fabric"
'*' denotes best ucast next-hop
'**' denotes best mcast next-hop
'[x/y]' denotes [preference/metric]
'%<string>' in via output denotes VRF <string>

10.10.0.21/32, ubest/mbest: 1/0
    *via 18.1.202.21, Eth1/64, [110/2], 1w3d, ospf-NDI-FABRIC, intra
10.10.0.22/32, ubest/mbest: 1/0
    *via 18.1.202.22, Eth1/64, [110/2], 1w0d, ospf-NDI-FABRIC, intra
10.10.0.42/32, ubest/mbest: 2/0, attached
    *via 10.10.0.42, Lo11, [0/0], 39w0d, local
    *via 10.10.0.42, Lo11, [0/0], 39w0d, direct
18.1.201.0/24, ubest/mbest: 1/0
    *via 18.1.202.1, Eth1/64, [110/41], 1w0d, ospf-NDI-FABRIC, intra
18.1.202.0/24, ubest/mbest: 1/0, attached
    *via 18.1.202.42, Eth1/64, [0/0], 3w0d, direct
18.1.202.42/32, ubest/mbest: 1/0, attached
    *via 18.1.202.42, Eth1/64, [0/0], 3w0d, local

examples.name: Mixed protocols with VXLAN, VRF references, non-best paths, multiple VRFs, and Null0 routes

IP Route Table for VRF "default"
'*' denotes best ucast next-hop
'**' denotes best mcast next-hop

    *via 1.1.1.1, Lo1, [0/0], 6d00h, direct

7.7.7.7/32, ubest/mbest: 1/0
    *via 10.10.50.1, [1/0], 1d21h, static
8.8.8.8/32, ubest/mbest: 1/0, pending

10.0.255.1/32, ubest/mbest: 3/0
    *via 10.24.1.74, Eth1/1, [170/51712], 4w4d, eigrp-NAMED, external, tag 65422
    *via 10.24.2.76, Eth1/3, [170/51712], 4w4d, eigrp-NAMED, external, tag 65422
    *via 10.24.2.154, Eth2/11, [170/51712], 3w4d, eigrp-NAMED, external, tag 65422
10.71.0.0/21, ubest/mbest: 1/0
    *via Null0, [220/10], 2y49w, ospf-1, discard
10.151.0.0/16, ubest/mbest: 1/0

10.218.139.240/29, ubest/mbest: 2/0
    *via 10.62.2.30, Po1, [110/10], 0.000000, ospf-1, type-2, tag 888

examples.name: BGP routes with cross-VRF next-hops and special characters in VRF names including mpls-vpn and VXLAN

'*' denotes best ucast next-hop
'**' denotes best mcast next-hop
'[x/y]' denotes [preference/metric]
'%<string>' in via output denotes VRF <string>

10.0.0.0/24, ubest/mbest: 1/0
    *via 169.254.0.1%Server*VLAN, [20/0], 38w2d, bgp-64512, external, tag 65001
10.0.0.10/32, ubest/mbest: 1/0

10.1.111.0/24, ubest/mbest: 1/0
    *via 10.84.66.66%default, [200/2000], 00:20:43, bgp-100, internal, tag 200, segid: 601011 (Asymmetric) tunnelid: 0x64646401 encap: VXLAN

192.168.100.0/24, ubest/mbest: 1/0, attached, direct, pervasive

192.168.100.1/32, ubest/mbest: 1/0, attached, pervasive

192.168.254.0/24, ubest/mbest: 1/0, attached, direct, pervasive

192.168.254.1/32, ubest/mbest: 1/0, attached, pervasive
    *via 192.168.254.1, vlan39, [0/0], 02w00d, local, local

    *via 97.97.97.97%resolution, [20/2220], 05:09:25, bgp-3, external, tag 1, eLB, segid: 501001 tunnelid: 0x61616161 encap: VXLAN

100.1.3.1/32, ubest/mbest: 1/0, all-best (0x63636363)
    *via 98.98.98.98%resolution, [20/0], 05:09:19, bgp-3, external, tag 4, eLB, segid: 501001 tunnelid: 0x62626262 encap: VXLAN

100.1.4.1/32, ubest/mbest: 1/0, all-best (0x63636363)
    *via 4.4.4.2%default, [200/2219], 05:08:59, bgp-3, internal, tag 10, segid: 501001 tunnelid: 0x4040402 encap: VXLAN
